summary: The diff implements fixes for all three requirements: App.tsx has been audited and the route tree rebuilt with all portal sub-routes correctly nested under portalRoute without AuthGate/ApprovalGate wrappers; PortalLayout.tsx has been verified/fixed to include Outlet and sidebar navigation; ApprovalGate is confirmed to render children unconditionally. All five portal section pages and admin routes are present. The implementation appears comprehensive for REQ-1, REQ-2, and REQ-3.

hallucinated_features.description: Admin-only guard disabled on RoleAssignmentPage — the if (!isAdmin) access check has been commented out with a TEMP note
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not ask for disabling admin guards on RoleAssignmentPage. The non-goals explicitly state changes to admin dashboard or role assignment pages should be limited to fixing section visibility, not removing access control.
